# terrible_community_grafana_grafana_dashboard (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `commit_message` (String) Set a commit message for the version history. Only used when `state` is `present`.
- `dashboard_id` (String) Public Grafana.com dashboard id to import
- `dashboard_revision` (String) Revision of the public grafana dashboard to import
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `folder` (String) UID of the folder where the dashboard will be created or imported. Required if `parent_folder` is set.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `org_id` (Number) The Grafana organization ID where the dashboard will be imported / exported / deleted. Not used when *grafana_api_key* is set, because the grafana_api_key only belongs to one organization. Mutually exclusive with `org_name`.
- `org_name` (String) The Grafana organization name where the dashboard will be imported / exported / deleted. Not used when *grafana_api_key* is set, because the grafana_api_key only belongs to one organization. Mutually exclusive with `org_id`.
- `overwrite` (Boolean) Override existing dashboard when state is present.
- `parent_folder` (String) UID of the parent folder used to scope the search for the specified `folder`. Available with subfolder feature of Grafana 11.
- `path` (String) The path to the json file containing the Grafana dashboard to import or export. A http URL is also accepted (since 2.10). Required if `state` is `export` or `present`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `slug` (String) Deprecated since Grafana 5. Use grafana dashboard uid instead. slug of the dashboard. It's the friendly url name of the dashboard. When `state` is `present`, this parameter can override the slug in the meta section of the json file. If you want to import a json dashboard exported directly from the interface (not from the api), you have to specify the slug parameter because there is no meta section in the exported json.
- `state` (String) State of the dashboard.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `uid` (String) Used to identify the dashboard when `state` is `export` or `absent`. When `state` is `present`, this can be used to set the UID during dashboard creation.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
